programme.desc: Special access to a cutting-edge archaeological investigation might reveal the final resting place of Cleopatra's mummy, and using the latest hi-tech science, experts are rethinking everything they know about the mysterious last queen of Egypt.

programme.title: Unearthed: Jericho's Buried Secrets
programme.desc: New discoveries at the lost city of Jericho offer fresh evidence about the biblical battle that brought its impregnable walls down. Using the latest tech, experts might reveal if Joshua and the Israelites really conquered this ancient city and how.

programme.title: Cleopatra: Sex, Lies, and Secrets
programme.desc: Special access to a cutting-edge archaeological investigation might reveal the final resting place of Cleopatra's mummy, and using the latest hi-tech science, experts are rethinking everything they know about the mysterious last queen of Egypt.

programme.title: Unearthed: Dead Sea Scrolls: The Dark Truth
programme.desc: The Dead Sea Scrolls are one of the Holy Land's greatest mysteries, but new discoveries might finally reveal the hidden meaning behind the strange texts, and as experts get closer to unmasking their author, they find clues of an ancient apocalypse.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Monster Spider
programme.desc: A massive spider's web takes over a park, leading experts to investigate if this monstrous trap could capture a human. A tree spurts out thick red blood, and some believe it could be an undiscovered species of carnivorous plant.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of Osiris
programme.desc: A camera captures a person inexplicably bursting into flames. An ancient statue at a museum appears to come to life at night. An alien-like creature is filmed in the sewers. Eerie lights caught on camera may explain a mysterious death.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Gateway To Hell
programme.desc: A fire-breathing crater burns in the middle of a desert, and some suspect it's a gateway to hell. A deadly shark is found lurking in a golf course water hazard, and experts are baffled how it got there. A giant white blob threatens a town in California.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Return of the Ice Monster
programme.desc: A giant creature in an armor of ice is spotted in the Alaskan wild, and some suspect it's a deadly mythical monster. A jet has a close encounter with an unknown object. Evidence of a deadly lightning strike invites paranormal explanations.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Incident at Area 51
programme.desc: Near Area 51, a police convoy is filmed transporting an alien-looking craft in the dead of night. When strange beams of light are reported in Argentina, experts investigate if it's proof of a terrifying Nazi superweapon.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: World's Biggest Cruise Ship
programme.desc: Go inside the largest cruise ship on the planet: a massive ship that's 1,181 feet long and weighs a staggering 227,000 tons.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: Underwater Mega Tower
programme.desc: One of the most cutting-edge buildings in the world is a 16-story hotel built on the cliffs of an abandoned quarry, and using the latest science and tech, engineers race to build this innovative mega-structure with two underwater floors.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: Chernobyl's Toughest Fix
programme.desc: The Chernobyl disaster created one of the world's deadliest places, and as the temporary fix around the damaged reactor begins to fail, engineers race to build a cutting-edge structure to contain the contamination that could threaten the world.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: Spy Plane Declassified
programme.desc: A state-of-the-art NATO airplane is one of the most complex surveillance tools in the world, and special access inside this behemoth reveals how cutting-edge engineering and a hi-tech midair refueling system helps its crew defend against security threats.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: US Army's Super Tank
programme.desc: The US Army's Abrams tank is a 70-ton war machine capable of reaching speeds of 45 miles per hour on the most extreme terrains on earth, but before it enters the battlefield, it must face a set of brutal challenges to put its engineering to the test.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: US Navy's Super Submarine
programme.desc: The Virginia Class is one of the most advanced nuclear powered, fast attack submarines ever produced for the US Navy. These technological titans are almost 400 feet long, and weigh a staggering 7,800 tons.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: F-35 Fighter Jet
programme.desc: The F-35 is the most advanced fighter jet on the planet, and special access into the most expensive military program ever reveals how engineers use cutting-edge technology to outfit this 1,200 mile-per-hour aircraft with a state-of-the-art stealth system.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: US Navy's Aircraft Carrier
programme.desc: The US Navy's Ford-class aircraft carrier is the world's largest warship, and using the latest naval and aeronautic technology, engineers and military personnel race to build and test this cutting-edge vessel.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Fear Thy Father
programme.desc: Charles Sexton was taught that his father, Eddie, was God. At first, he and his siblings were willing and loyal disciples, but as the family descended into madness, Charles discovered that in the Sexton family, crossing his parents meant death.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Hate Being Daddy's Girl
programme.desc: When Robin Doll was rescued from her mother's violence and went to live with her father, she thought she had cheated death. She had no way of knowing that the man she looked to as her savior was hiding something even worse.

programme.title: The 93 Victims of Samuel Little: A Roadmap of Death
programme.desc: A chance phone call brings together an FBI crime analyst, a DOJ forensics expert and a Texas Ranger, who join forces in an attempt to gain a cold-case murder confession from convicted killer Samuel Little. They get much more than they ever imagined.

programme.title: The 93 Victims of Samuel Little: A Roadmap of Death
programme.desc: A chance phone call brings together an FBI crime analyst, a DOJ forensics expert and a Texas Ranger, who join forces in an attempt to gain a cold-case murder confession from convicted killer Samuel Little. They get much more than they ever imagined.

programme.title: The 93 Victims of Samuel Little: A Roadmap of Death
programme.desc: A chance phone call brings together an FBI crime analyst, a DOJ forensics expert and a Texas Ranger, who join forces in an attempt to gain a cold-case murder confession from convicted killer Samuel Little. They get much more than they ever imagined.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Grim Sleeper
programme.desc: A lone survivor is the only witness who can help police track down a serial killer known as the Grim Sleeper, who preys on women in South Central Los Angeles. After decades of searching, police hone in on an unlikely suspect.

programme.title: The 93 Victims of Samuel Little: A Roadmap of Death
programme.desc: A chance phone call brings together an FBI crime analyst, a DOJ forensics expert and a Texas Ranger, who join forces in an attempt to gain a cold-case murder confession from convicted killer Samuel Little. They get much more than they ever imagined.

programme.title: The 93 Victims of Samuel Little: A Roadmap of Death
programme.desc: A chance phone call brings together an FBI crime analyst, a DOJ forensics expert and a Texas Ranger, who join forces in an attempt to gain a cold-case murder confession from convicted killer Samuel Little. They get much more than they ever imagined.

programme.title: The 93 Victims of Samuel Little: A Roadmap of Death
programme.desc: A chance phone call brings together an FBI crime analyst, a DOJ forensics expert and a Texas Ranger, who join forces in an attempt to gain a cold-case murder confession from convicted killer Samuel Little. They get much more than they ever imagined.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Grim Sleeper
programme.desc: A lone survivor is the only witness who can help police track down a serial killer known as the Grim Sleeper, who preys on women in South Central Los Angeles. After decades of searching, police hone in on an unlikely suspect.

programme.title: Suspicion: A Sister's Suspicion
programme.desc: When married mother of two Debbie Groseclose disappears without a trace, law enforcement are left mystified as to her whereabouts. With no evidence and no witnesses, it is up to Debbie's family to follow their suspicions and catch her killer.

programme.title: Suspicion: Slaughter on the Schuykill
programme.desc: In 2002 a pro soccer star and good samaritan becomes mixed up in a bizarre and all consuming murder investigation of a homeless woman. It's a journey that pushes him to the brink of insanity and leads him to risk his own life in pursuit of the truth.

programme.title: Suspicion: Edge of Insanity
programme.desc: Toni Ingram's 19 year old daughter, Morgan is creative and funny. Threatening behavior quickly escalates into stalking. Toni and her husband are thrown into a desperate race to unmask their daughter's nemesis before everything they hold dear is destroyed.

programme.title: Suspicion: A Mormon Mom's Mission
programme.desc: Utah mom Jennifer is sent on a journey of despair and discovery in the aftermath of her sister-in-law's mysterious disappearance. Suspicion soon falls on the person Jennifer least expects - her own brother - and it's left to her to unearth the truth.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Family
programme.desc: Allegations of stolen children, drugs, abuse and a leader who claimed to be the second coming of Christ, lead authorities to a cult that began in Australia and led the FBI to New York.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Family... A Cult Revealed
programme.desc: Det. Lex de Man was on the trail of 'The Family' cult leader, Anne Hamilton-Byrne and her husband, when he got a tip that they were in New York. With the help of the FBI, he found them in the Catskills and escorted them home. Peter Van Sant reports.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Disappearance of Kelley Dwyer
programme.desc: Kelly Dwyer vanished after a night out on a date in Milwaukee in October 2013. The investigation raises questions about the risks of online dating, dangerous sex and the hidden double lives of loved ones. Peter Van Sant reports.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Shape of a Killer
programme.desc: After three similar murders, Austin, Texas police began to wonder if a serial killer was on the loose. A man out for a late night walk testing a thermal imaging nightscope might have captured images of the killer.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Slaying Season
programme.desc: When a single mother of three misses a routine bank run with her sister, panic begins to spread among the family. The family's nightmare becomes a reality when a passerby finds the beloved petite woman brutally assaulted, nude, and frozen in an alley.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Permanent Frost
programme.desc: On a wintery December evening, a 29 year old supermom doesn't return home after her meeting. Is she going to miss her daughter's first Christmas? Her family is devastated when the devoted mother is found frozen solid and dumped in the snow.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Dead of Winter
programme.desc: On a snowy Pittsburgh night a young doctor is found beaten, slashed and slain in his bathtub. While everyone struggles with the shocking loss, detectives develop a psychological profile of a killer who will likely strike again unless they find him.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Ice Breaker
programme.desc: A frigid winter hovers over St Paul, Minnesota. 30 year old Kira Steger hasn't reported to work and her family and friends are terrified she might be in danger. Her disappearance leads to a three month investigation that halts to a heartbreaking ending.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Fallujah: The Taking of Terror Central
programme.desc: Operation Phantom Fury was meant to be a 48 hour battle but insurgents, armed with IEDs and a stockpile of grenades, fought back. US forces faced one of the toughest urban conflicts since Vietnam as they tried to reclaim the city.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Khe Sanh: Marines Under Siege
programme.desc: Six thousand outnumbered marines fight for survival against a vast, highly trained Communist army in a bloody 77 day siege. It's a battle that will shape the course of the war in Vietnam.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Hue: Vietnam's Bloodiest Battle
programme.desc: In a final showdown marines must breech the heavily fortified walls of the ancient citadel where thousands of NVA soldiers lie in wait. After one of the bloodiest battles of the entire Vietnam War, the marines are finally victorious.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Hollywood Syndicate
programme.desc: Examine some of the common conspiracy theories surrounding Hollywood. Suspicions about the activities of the Church of Scientology and the hacking of Sony Pictures are amongst the topics discussed.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Alien Files
programme.desc: The final edition of the series examines a range of conspiracy theories relating to extra-terrestrials. There are those who believe that we have already made contact with aliens and that world governments are concealing this.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Vanished
programme.desc: Examine some of the most famous cases of disappearances that have gone on to spawn conspiracy theories to explain them. John Bingham, 7th Earl of Lucan, union leader Jimmy Hoffa and Robert Maxwell come under discussion.

programme.title: End of Days
programme.desc: The complex relationship between Christian and Jewish Zionists.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Khe Sanh: Marines Under Siege
programme.desc: Six thousand outnumbered marines fight for survival against a vast, highly trained Communist army in a bloody 77 day siege. It's a battle that will shape the course of the war in Vietnam.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Hitler's Last Bridge
programme.desc: A brave band of regular GI's are tasked with saving the last bridge and final gateway to the Third Reich. The bridge is bristling with German guns loaded with explosives. Worse, the enemy plan to destroy the bridge if the American unit assaults it.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Mountain Massacre
programme.desc: The Black Devils, a joint American-Canadian mountain warfare unit, are about to go into action. They must mount a do-or-die night-time assault up a treacherous mountain, in extreme weather, to take on heavily-entrenched battle hardened German defenses.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Rangers Lead the Way
programme.desc: United States Army Rangers spearhead one of the biggest amphibious landings in history: the Allied invasion of France. They must scale vertical cliffs before facing the enemy, then destroy the guns that threaten to blow the Allied forces out of the water.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil
programme.desc: This series examines the lives and actions of history's worst dictators for answers.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Eastern Front
programme.desc: The war reaches a critical turning point as Hitler expands the war to a second front. German soldiers endure the unrelenting climate of the Eastern Front, and face the full-force of angry Red Army fighters.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of Berlin
programme.desc: Survivors recount the horrors and strength behind surviving such a merciless place and the shock of Allied soldiers as they discover the evil secret of Germany's concentration camps.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Heroes of Tarawa
programme.desc: Everything went wrong in America's first test of whether the Japanese-held islands of the Pacific, the key steppingstones to the doorstep of Japan, could be captured by across-the-beach infantry assaults.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Desert War
programme.desc: The war that's encompassed the globe takes root in Africa. An ambitious Mussolini expands the war into North Africa; he sends ill-prepared soldiers, and forces Hitler to come to his ally's aid.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Waking the Beast
programme.desc: On December 7, 1941 Japan gambles all and attacks the US. In the first months of the war it looks as though Japan is unbeatable until the US fights back. The War in the Pacific engulfs Asia and launches an entirely new form of naval warfare.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The River House: Part 2
programme.desc: Mike throws Michael a curveball that has major consequences for their business partnership. The rebuild of the River House continues as they battle muck, rain and snow, and after many stressful months, the property is ready to be revealed.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The Country House: Part 1
programme.desc: Mike and Michael buy a bungalow in the country that sits on five acres with a barn and two-car garage. It also has major water issues, leeching bed woes and a flooring battle that won't be swept under the rug.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The Country House: Part 2
programme.desc: Mike and Michael rush to finish the Country House before winter hits, but their schedule and budget are tested when an open permit, left on the barn by previous owners, is discovered.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Backyard or Water Park?
programme.desc: Why go on vacation when you have your own resort-worthy pool right in your own backyard?

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Top of the Mountain
programme.desc: Lucas heads west to Bountiful, UT to build a dream backyard on the side of a mountain. Faced with many challenges, Lucas creates a Tuscan themed pool complete with a spa, the biggest linear fire wall he's ever built and a grotto with a 23,000 pound lid.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Mountain Lodge Oasis
programme.desc: The Lucas Lagoons crew is asked to create a Rocky Mountain style lagoon for a family in the Florida wetlands. It doesn't take long before Lucas realises his clients will be watching him throughout the building process.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Piña Pool-ada
programme.desc: Lucas creates a tropical oasis complete with an island, a large grotto rock and a Tiki-themed cabana.

programme.title: Paid Program

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Risky Business
programme.desc: Two friends attempt to expand their real estate business by flipping their first house in Rochester, NY. However, when project after project goes awry, they quickly have regrets.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1785 Three-Room Makeover
programme.desc: Carpenter Jeff Devlin takes on his latest project, a 1785 stone farmhouse owned by the Vitale family in Bucks County, Pennsylvania. Jeff's first task is to give a facelift to the 230-year-old fireplace. He then moves on to the kitchen and mudroom.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1700s Master Bedroom and Library
programme.desc: Carpenter Jeff Devlin restores a master bedroom and library in an amazing stone home in Bucks County, PA. The original home dates back to 1700 but the two rooms sit in additions that came later and lack some of the historic character.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1760 Guest House Restoration
programme.desc: Jeff restores a kitchen and living room in a 1760 farmhouse for Tracey and Scott, who now use it as a guest house. The house was the original structure on their farm, which now contains a newer main house and several outbuildings.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1684 Basement Gut Job
programme.desc: Jeff heads to Aston, PA, to restore the basement of one of the oldest houses in the area. The owners want to use the space for entertaining, so Jeff creates two bar areas, a sitting area, and restores an adjacent space to make a mudroom and entryway.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1760 Classic Colonial Parlor
programme.desc: An 1800s Center Colonial farmhouse addition to a 1760 stone home is turned into a classic parlor with a bar area and a billiards room.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1729 Kitchen and Living Room Addition
programme.desc: Jeff Devlin heads to a 1729 home to look at the kitchen and living room additions. He brings in reclaimed barn beams to create a threshold in between the rooms, adds a unique blend of rustic cabinetry and makes a coffee table out of a surprise piece.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Tiny Forest Cottage
programme.desc: New York newlyweds escape the city to build their first home upstate in a secluded part of the Hudson Valley. Utilizing timber felled from their own property, they plan to craft their own tiny house completely off the grid.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Mountain Man Cave
programme.desc: Joe Donovan, an avid skier and adventurer, has found the perfect spot for his permanent base camp on a remote ridge in southwest Montana. Follow the adventure as he battles the elements to build his rustic, straw bale, dream cabin.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Colorado Mountain Lodges
programme.desc: A Colorado couple attempts to build one of the most energy-efficient homesteads in the state. Mother Nature and bleeding edge technologies give them a run for their money as they race to complete their high-end alpine lodge before winter hits.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Corbels and Chaos
programme.desc: Tamara sees great potential in a 1938 cottage with an unusual layout, unfinished renovation and no front door. She constructs a cathedral ceiling and creates two cedar corbels for the entrance. The cost of an egress window may crack her budget.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Skylight Surprise
programme.desc: Tamara struggles to install a full bath and enlarge the master suite as she continues to renovate the 1938 cottage. She successfully creates a hidden playroom in the kids' bedroom, but fails to win her dad's approval on her plan for the backyard shed.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Move That Kitchen
programme.desc: Tamara renovates a single-story ranch and tackles her biggest challenge to date, transforming the former master bedroom into a stunning, open kitchen. However, she and her dad run into problems during demolition.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Copper Showstopper
programme.desc: Tamara continues renovations on the ranch by creating a new master suite. While polishing the copper fireplace hood, Tamara and her dad use a familiar solution that has unusual results. Her plans to create a sunroom run into problems due to weather.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Raise the Roof
programme.desc: Tamara gets creative renovating an expansive 1950s ranch-style home. She updates the exterior with faux stone and adds another floor to the 3,000-square-foot home, but rain and an old fireplace force her to rethink her plans and budget.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Stairway to Master Suite Heaven
programme.desc: Tamara Day uses her 1,400-square-foot second-story addition to create three new bedrooms in a 1950 ranch home.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: All Bricked Out
programme.desc: Tamara takes an 1892 brick Craftsman that was converted into three apartments and tries to restore it back into a single-family dwelling while keeping original details.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Swing of Things
programme.desc: Tamara continues working on an 1892 Craftsman and struggles to add a master bathroom. Then, she finds a way to repurpose floor boards into a porch swing, but her plan to reuse a clawfoot tub hits a snag because of a narrow doorway.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fiery Fish and Fowl
programme.desc: In North Bend, Ore., Chef Roger Mooking meets up with Don Ivy, Chief of the Coquille Tribe. Roger and Don roast a school of salmon for a traditional tribal feast.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: All You Can Feast
programme.desc: Roger Mooking goes to Llano Seco Ranch in Chico, Calif., where he and Charlie Thieriot slow roast a 30-pound porchetta. In Sandy, Ore., Rogers meets caterers Jaret Foster and Mona Johnson and assists in roasting mussels.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Taste of Texas
programme.desc: The smoke signals lead Roger to two popular food trucks in Texas serving up delicious ethnic eats. In Grapevine, Texas, Roger meets Pit Master Trey Sánchez of Vaqueros Bar-B-Q who is known for combining authentic Texas-style barbecue with Mexican dishes.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: The Salt and the Sea
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is spending the day at Jacobsen Salt Co., in Netarts Bay, Oregon, one of the largest producers of handcrafted sea salt in America. Owner Ben Jacobsen takes Roger on a tour of the facility, showing him how to smoke sea salt.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Austin, Texas
programme.desc: Casey Webb's appetizing trek across America brings him to Austin, TX. He starts with a 2-pound barbecue behemoth packed with every meat, sauce and side on the menu.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Antonio, TX
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to San Antonio, Texas. His first stop is San Antonio's oldest restaurant- a German deli- for the Wienerschnitzel.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Philadelphia, Pa
programme.desc: Casey Webb sails to Philadelphia to tackle the epic Classic Whale Challenge, a 13-pound bagel sandwich stuffed with cream cheese, nova salmon, whitefish, tomatoes and onions.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Seattle, Washington
programme.desc: Casey travels to Seattle where he climbs a Mount Fuji-sized burger and takes on seven terrifyingly spicy Buffalo wings that have defeated over 5,000 challengers.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Breakfast Bonanza
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tour of tasty treats has convinced him that breakfast is the most important meal of the day, and he's inducting his favorites into the Man v. Food Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Most Perfect Pork
programme.desc: Casey's eating odyssey has taken him all over the country and back again, and it's finally time to honour the best of the best. We're counting down the five most perfect pork dishes in Man v. Food history.

programme.title: Eddie Eats America: Philadelphia
programme.desc: World's Strongest Man 2017 winner Eddie Hall gets roped into a strength test with legendary boxing coach Buster Custus at a famed Philadelphia gym before he gets a double hit of delicious Philly cheesesteak.

programme.title: Eddie Eats America: Brooklyn
programme.desc: World's Strongest Man winner, Eddie Hall hits Brooklyn to take on a huge Mac and Cheese eating challenge, sample NYC's best cheesecake and bend metal with a Coney Island strongman.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Sweet Treats and Savory Meats
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Boston with triple-processed pork belly that's cured, brined and smoked to meaty perfection. In Seattle, tender braised lamb shoulder amps up a traditional breakfast hash.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Extra Meat Please
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Queens, New York, with a burger loaded to the max with beef, ham, bacon and sausage.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Philadelphia, Pa
programme.desc: Casey Webb sails to Philadelphia to tackle the epic Classic Whale Challenge, a 13-pound bagel sandwich stuffed with cream cheese, nova salmon, whitefish, tomatoes and onions.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Seattle, Washington
programme.desc: Casey travels to Seattle where he climbs a Mount Fuji-sized burger and takes on seven terrifyingly spicy Buffalo wings that have defeated over 5,000 challengers.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Golden Moments
programme.desc: The girls begin to panic when Sophia says she's moving out to go live with her son.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Golden Moments

programme.desc: A man posing as Frasier drops dead and the mix-up allows Frasier to read his obituary.

programme.desc: Frasier reluctantly invites Lilith to eat dinner with his fellow Cranes for Thanksgiving.

programme.title: Frasier: Back Talk

programme.desc: Ricky hires a business expert to solve the family budget problems.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy Cries Wolf

programme.title: I Love Lucy: The Matchmaker
programme.desc: Lucy tries to catch a bachelor for a husband-seeking girlfriend.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Larceny and Old Lace

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Rose's Big Adventure

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Mister Terrific
programme.desc: Rose begins to date 'Mr. Terrific', a kiddie show host, who gets fired when Dorothy gets a part-time job as a consultant on the show, a job he helped her get.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Mother's Day
programme.desc: While waiting for phone calls from their children wishing them a happy Mother's Day, the girls reminisce about past Mother's Days.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Yes, We Have No Havanas

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Days and Nights of Sophia Petrillo
programme.desc: Sophia organizes a band to raise money, volunteers at the hospital and battles return policies at the supermarket.

programme.title: Movie: A Novel Romance

programme.title: Movie: Bound and Babysitting
programme.desc: A woman is forced to baby-sit with her college nemesis and begins to see him in a new light.

programme.title: Movie: All for Love
programme.desc: A romance novelist worries she's lost her touch after a string of unsuccessful events. She sets her new book around a Navy Seal hero and dives into research with a retired Seal who teaches her skills she didn't know she had.

programme.title: Movie: A Dash of Love
programme.desc: When an aspiring chef lands an assistant job at her idol's restaurant, she's convinced her big break is just around the corner. After a rocky start, she befriends the handsome executive chef and they bond in the kitchen.

programme.title: South Park: City on the Edge of Forever (Flashbacks)

programme.title: South Park: Chinpoko Mon
programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Cartman and Kenny are caught up in the latest fad from Japan: Chinpoko Mon. Little do they know, they are being brainwashed by the Japanese to once again bomb Pearl Harbor.

programme.title: South Park: Cow Days
programme.desc: South Park's 14th Annual Cow Days rodeo and carnival is here and the boys are determined to win Terrance and Phillip dolls. Meanwhile, someone has stolen the Cow Memorial statue, and newcomers Tom and Mary are blamed for the theft.

programme.title: South Park: Wing
programme.desc: The boys set up the 'Awesome Talent Agency' and pool all their resources to impress their first client only to have an agency run by the Chinese Mafia steal her away.

programme.title: South Park: The Poor Kid
programme.desc: Kenny ends up in the foster care system after his parents are arrested.

programme.title: South Park: The Biggest Douche in the Universe
programme.desc: When a famous psychic fails to help him exorcise Kenny from his body, Cartman and Chef travel to the moors of Scotland, where Chef's mom tries a little of her voodoo magic on him.

programme.title: South Park: Chef's Chocolate Salty Balls
programme.desc: South Park's first film festival attracts crowds of pretentious, tofu-eating movie lovers to the quiet mountain town. The influx of raw vegetable waste taxes the sewage system putting Mr. Hankey's life in jeopardy.

programme.title: South Park: The Succubus
programme.desc: Chef's parents arrive in South Park from Scotland fresh from an encounter with the Loch Ness Monster to attend Chef's wedding. However, the boys believe Chef's bride-to-be is a succubus, and they try to stop the wedding.

programme.title: South Park: Gnomes

programme.title: South Park: How to Eat With Your Butt

programme.title: South Park: Kenny Dies

programme.title: The Closer: An Ugly Game
programme.desc: The routine arrest of a crack addict exposes a questionable rehab facility and leads Brenda and her squad on a race to find a missing young woman. The case leads Fritz to reveal to Brenda some ugly truths about her past.

programme.title: The Closer: Unknown Trouble
programme.desc: A murder investigation leads the team to the owner of a music label; Brenda is sued.

programme.title: The Closer: Repeat Offender
programme.desc: Brenda and her team investigate the murder of a young girl who was house-sitting.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Foot Loose
programme.desc: When a severed human foot washes up on shore, the squad is called in to identify the victim and track down the murderer as more body parts are found. Meanwhile, Angela helps out Korsak at the Dirty Robber.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Gumshoe
programme.desc: The squad must work together with a private investigator when a clothing designer is found poisoned and his wife reported missing. Jane asks Maura to teach Angela to better handle her finances.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: In Plain View
programme.desc: Jane and the squad team up with another detective who believes they are both hunting for the same killer. Meanwhile, after discovering her identity has been stolen, Maura enlists the help of Angela to find the culprit.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Rise Up
programme.desc: The Chief announces that a solo surgery will be awarded sending the residents into a competitive frenzy; Derek turns to Bailey for advice and Erica discovers a shocking connection between one of her surgical residents and a long-time patient.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: The Ties That Bind
programme.desc: One of Meredith's oldest friends becomes an intern at Seattle Grace but Meredith's friends are less than welcoming. Lexie leads her fellow interns in secretive, unorthodox surgical training sessions and a new surgeon brings order to the OR.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: In the Midnight Hour
programme.desc: Meredith, Cristina and Bailey come to Lexie and Sadie's rescue when a routine surgery goes horribly wrong. While Owen and Derek treat a man who was seriously injured during a sleepwalking episode, Mark comforts the sleepwalker's distraught daughter.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise. It would take three years, an exhumation and a second autopsy to determine who was right.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dark Waters
programme.desc: Investigators face the daunting task of searching for one boat among many others after a hit-and-run boating accident caused the death of a young man. Detectives hope witnesses to the accident can help them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pinned by the Evidence
programme.desc: A street fight takes the life of a wrestler. A jury believes the accused killed in cold blood. He gets sentenced to twenty years in prison. Six years later, he is granted another trial when a forensic animator offers a different explanation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cries Unheard
programme.desc: When a 19-year-old girl is first found dead in her car, it seems to be an apparent suicide. Unsatisfied investigators probe the case further and discover the girl was involved in a complicated love quadrangle, giving several people a motive to kill her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Past Lives: The Madison Rutherford Case
programme.desc: The body of a wealthy American businessman is found in his rental car. When the victim's wife files a claim for $7 million of life insurance, investigators seek the help of a forensic anthropologist and uncover a chilling scheme of fraud and deceit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over and Out
programme.desc: A pipe bomb explodes in a house, killing a man and wounding his mother. Police use a lot number on a battery and a mailing label to track down the bomber, and determine his motive.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crash Course
programme.desc: A highway patrolman is shocked by a coroner's ruling of an 'accidental death.' after he attends a Crash scene with far more blood than usual. An anonymous tip reinvigorates the investigation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg Up on Crime
programme.desc: The case of a decomposed body found in an irrigation canal goes unsolved until shoe prints left by the careless criminal while dumping the body of his second victim give authorities the evidence they need.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elemental Clue
programme.desc: Police fear a serial killer is on the loose when two women in the same town are murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Moss Not Grass
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead on a golf course in the Bahamas, and the evidence leads police to two suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Van-ished
programme.desc: A twelve-year-old girl claimed she had been abducted and sexually assaulted. She recounted what happened in such a flat, unemotional voice that police found it difficult to believe her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Novel Idea
programme.desc: When a frantic call from a man claiming his wife fell down the stairs brings investigators to their home, they are concerned by the unusually large number of bloodstains, and how big they are.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muffled Cries
programme.desc: An attractive university student was forcibly abducted from a mall parking lot and never seen alive again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Critical Manoeuvre
programme.desc: A truck driver claims the life of a high school football standout and flees the scene. Fortunately, a trace evidence expert examines paint particles found near the accident and leads investigators to the man behind the wheel.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trial by Fire
programme.desc: A house erupts into flames on a winter night, killing one person and injuring another. The survivor blamed a kerosene heater for the fire, but the evidence did not match her story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marked for Life
programme.desc: In 1957 the police search for a man who committed several crimes in one night, including murder. Eventually, the case turned cold. Almost fifty years later, with the help of scientific advances, the investigators find their man.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Puzzle
programme.desc: When a bicycle rider is struck and fatally injured in a hit-and-run accident, forensic investigators utilize an assortment of miniscule clues to determine the identity of the offending vehicle and eventually the person who was driving it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Up in Smoke
programme.desc: When an elderly couple die in a housefire their son becomes the prime suspect. The son insists that he is innocent, and that his efforts to extinguish the fire made it worse. Investigators turn to science to determine the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Weakest Link
programme.desc: There are no clues to identify a body found along a rural road. Even after a determined detective finds the 'key' to identifying her, it takes a close analysis of a tire tread and a broken piece of jewellery to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: Police suspect a man in a hit and run, but he leased the car in question to someone in another state. Police found the vehicle and took it apart, uncovering evidence telling them just what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise. It would take three years, an exhumation and a second autopsy to determine who was right.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dark Waters
programme.desc: Investigators face the daunting task of searching for one boat among many others after a hit-and-run boating accident caused the death of a young man. Detectives hope witnesses to the accident can help them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pinned by the Evidence
programme.desc: A street fight takes the life of a wrestler. A jury believes the accused killed in cold blood. He gets sentenced to twenty years in prison. Six years later, he is granted another trial when a forensic animator offers a different explanation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cries Unheard
programme.desc: When a 19-year-old girl is first found dead in her car, it seems to be an apparent suicide. Unsatisfied investigators probe the case further and discover the girl was involved in a complicated love quadrangle, giving several people a motive to kill her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Past Lives: The Madison Rutherford Case
programme.desc: The body of a wealthy American businessman is found in his rental car. When the victim's wife files a claim for $7 million of life insurance, investigators seek the help of a forensic anthropologist and uncover a chilling scheme of fraud and deceit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over and Out
programme.desc: A pipe bomb explodes in a house, killing a man and wounding his mother. Police use a lot number on a battery and a mailing label to track down the bomber, and determine his motive.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Hell In the Heartland: What Happened to Ashley and Lauria: The Fire
programme.desc: On the night of December 30, 1999 a fire rips through the Freeman family home. Four people are in the house that night, but only two bodies are found. Investigators discover that there's much more to the story than they first thought.

programme.title: Hell In the Heartland: What Happened to Ashley and Lauria: The Suspects
programme.desc: After digging into the 1999 murders, Jax and Sarah discover that this story is more complicated than it appears. Exploring all possible leads, they find a string of serial murderers and drug kingpins that may have had a hand in this case.

programme.title: Hell In the Heartland: What Happened to Ashley and Lauria: The Dig
programme.desc: With new info about the location of the girls’ possibly buried bodies, Jax and Sarah prepare for a dig that could finally provide the answers.

programme.title: Hell In the Heartland: What Happened to Ashley and Lauria: The Arrest
programme.desc: After a new Sheriff takes over the investigation, the case is blown wide open when he discovers a box of evidence that leads to what the families have been waiting years for; an arrest.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Silk Stalkings
programme.desc: The news of a flight attendant's brutal murder prompts a man to contact police with details of another similar case. After considering the evidence, police determine they are dealing with a serial killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fishing for the Truth
programme.desc: A rescued deckhand tells the story of how he tried desperately to free his captain when his foot got caught as their small boat was sinking in a storm. He's quickly hailed a hero. But when the captain's body is found, a different story is told.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Just Desserts
programme.desc: A Florida couple is found dead just days before their planned move out of state. A known criminal's driver's license found at the crime scene seems too good to be true.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday's Wake
programme.desc: When a little girl got sick and died, investigators were stumped. Scientists would travel half-way around the world before finding the answer in two unlikely places.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: World's 8th Wonder
programme.desc: Josh is on the trail from Russia to Germany in search of history's most expensive stolen object, the Amber Chamber. Retracing the steps of Nazi soldiers, Josh explores abandoned Nazi bunkers and a hazardous German mine.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Secrets of Brother XII
programme.desc: Josh Gates attempts to uncover a treasure left behind by the Aquarian Foundation, an isolated, insidious cult led by the notorious leader known as Brother XII.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Cracking the D.B. Cooper Case
programme.desc: Josh Gates sets off on an expedition to crack the mystery behind the perpetrator of the only unsolved plane hijacking in US history.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: After the Hunt: Josh Gates Tonight: No Fear of Heists
programme.desc: Josh is putting together a crack crew who knows how to pull off a great heist movie. Josh's rogues' gallery of screen bandits includes Elliott Gould of Ocean's 11, Kevin Pollak from The Usual Suspects and Narcos' Luis Guzman.

programme.title: Dodgeball Thunderdome: Exploding Red Ball
programme.desc: A tattooed trainer flexes her muscles against a martial arts master. A benchwarmer in search of a comeback takes aim at a sporty single mom. With $25,000 on the line, only the strong survive The Thunderdome.

programme.title: Growing Belushi: The Weed Brothers
programme.desc: After losing the seeds of two prized Colombian strains, Jim and Chris are back at square one. The cousins explore Pablo Escobar's old haunts while trying to salvage their trip. Back home, they celebrate the harvest of Jim's strains with a big party.

programme.title: Rob Riggle: Global Investigator: The Holiest of Grails
programme.desc: Finding the actual Holy Grail is the holy grail for all global investigators, so Rob's on the case. He's following in the footsteps of the Knights Templars and unearthing new evidence that could prove the grail has been hidden in Scotland all this time.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cabin of No Return
programme.desc: An outdoorsy family of three is determined to build a mammoth off-grid cabin along Idaho's Salmon River after one of their properties was destroyed by a fire. The family takes on rapids to portage out materials and must finish before low tide hits.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Bottle Island
programme.desc: John Beal is ready to leave the city behind and embrace a life off the grid in Isla Mujeres, Mexico. He hires Richart Sowa and his son Eden to build an eco-friendly private floating island made from recycled plastic bottles.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Maine Mountain Home
programme.desc: A man turns his dreams into reality with a spacious, solar-powered dovetail log cabin made from trees harvested off his 100-acre woods.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Smoky Mountain Homestead
programme.desc: A family of five builds a forever home on their 46-acre property overlooking the Smoky Mountains.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Tropical Paradise
programme.desc: A couple plans to build an oceanfront oasis for their family on the slopes of Maui, Hawaii. To keep the budget low, they design a Quonset hut which can be built cheaply and quickly, but unexpected setbacks test their limits at every turn.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Earth Block Ranch
programme.desc: A family builds thousands of earth blocks while withstanding winter monsoons, freezing temperatures and more to finish their San Antonio forever home.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Appalachian Underground
programme.desc: A husband surprises his wife with a family vacation home on the edge of a Tennessee rock quarry.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Mushroom House
programme.desc: Sage Stoneman teams up with world-renowned natural builder SunRay Kelley to experiment with a never-before-used building material: mushrooms! Follow along as they not only design a mushroom-shaped house, but virtually grow one.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Alaska
programme.desc: The Perrins brothers are building an extremely remote log hunting cabin in the heart of the Alaskan Range, in the deep wilderness of Sheep Lake. They have just two weeks to construct an entire single-story cabin.

programme.title: 100 Days Wild: Entering Wild, Wild Country
programme.desc: Leaving comfortable lives behind, strangers journey to Alaska chasing dreams of an off-grid community. With only 100 days until winter, it's a race against nature. They immediately set off to hunt moose, but struggle against the elements and each other.

programme.title: 100 Days Wild: Rogue Rage
programme.desc: The newly-formed group desperately hunts for moose. When Oliver refuses to go along with the plan and is an obstacle in the line of fire, Andrew pushes back. Army veteran Adam arrives at base camp and immediately tackles critical building projects.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Home Sweet Homestead: Cold Hard Lockdown
programme.desc: The intense winter has frozen the water supply on the homestead, forcing Marty to hunt for a new water source. In Hawaii, Matt and his wife Katie self-film a lesson in Cacao harvesting on her family's plantation.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Drowning
programme.desc: The Raneys must save two Hawaiian homesteaders who built their dream homestead in the path of life-threatening flash floods. As the weather closes in, the Raneys must battle to save a homestead from drowning and also win the trust of the homesteaders.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Schenee's Story
programme.desc: Devastated by two miscarriages due to her weight, Schenee is desperate to start a family.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Zsalynn's Story
programme.desc: Zsaylnn, once known as the 'Fat Girl Rock Star,' married a man who loves large women. Now weighing over 600 lbs., she urgently needs to lose weight to be the mother her daughter deserves.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Pauline's Story
programme.desc: At nearly 700 lbs., 51-year-old Pauline has an addiction to food that is killing her and taking over the life of her son, who is the primary caretaker.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Alicia's Story
programme.desc: A devoted girlfriend and loving aunt, Alicia is all smiles and laughter on the outside, but on the inside she is terrified that her addiction to food will kill her before she can marry her long-time love or watch her nieces grow up.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Alicia and Pauline
programme.desc: Alicia's relationship with her boyfriend Tim comes under the microscope in the second year of her weight-loss journey. Then, Pauline is forced to beg her way back into the program after quitting in a huff when her last-weigh in did not go well.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Come on in, Grandma!

programme.desc: When her blog is discovered by a famous musician, Carlota fears her family will embarrass her. Then, when Hector decides to finish his schooling, he become Ronnie Anne and Carl's new classmate.

programme.title: The Loud House: Face the Music With the Casagrandes/ Pranks for the Memories With the Casagrandes
programme.desc: When Ronnie Anne discovers that each family member will perform at Hector's birthday, she turns to Sid for help. Ronnie Anne's attempts to bond with her cool older cousin Carlota lead to a prank war against the boy cousins.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Penny Foolish/ Nautical Novice
programme.desc: When SpongeBob finds a penny on the ground, Mr. Krabs becomes obsessed with having it in his possession. / SpongeBob tries to impress Mrs. Puff during a field trip to the Boating Museum.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob in RandomLand/ SpongeBob's Bad Habit
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Squidward take a delivery to a dreaded town where the laws of logic no longer apply. SpongeBob can't stop biting his nails, but he can't figure out why.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patchy's Playlist

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Accidents Will Happen/ The Other Patty
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs is manipulated into caring for Squidward when he gets injured on the job. Mr. Krabs and Plankton both have troubles at the new 'Flabby Patty' restaurant.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Secret Closet
programme.desc: Joey dreams about being with Rachel and betraying Ross; Chandler finds a secret closet.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Joey Tells Rachel
programme.desc: A guilt-ridden Joey finally fesses up to a speechless Ross about his feelings for Rachel.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Tea Leaves
programme.desc: Rachel hopes to restore her fallen relationship with Joey by conjuring up a big lie.

programme.title: Friends: The One in Massapequa

programme.title: Friends: The One With Joey's Interview

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Baby Shower
programme.desc: Rachel panics during her baby shower when she realizes she is unprepared for motherhood.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Cooking Class
programme.desc: Stung by a critical review of the food in her restaurant, Monica takes a cooking class.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Rachel Is Late
programme.desc: When Rachel's delivery date passes, her ensuing pain makes her increasingly crotchety.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Rachel Has a Baby
programme.desc: Rachel's long-awaited baby nears delivery while an anxious Ross hovers nervously in the background. Monica and Chandler decide that they are ready to become parents themselves.

programme.title: Mom: Finger Guns and a Beef Bourguignon
programme.desc: Christy discovers her new job at a law firm isn’t quite what she expected, and Bonnie’s therapist, Trevor, pushes her to confront her problem with procrastination.

programme.title: Mom: Crazy Hair and a Teeny Tiny Part of Canada
programme.desc: Bonnie and Adam make a hasty decision.

programme.title: Mom: Pilot
programme.desc: A newly sober single mother is trying to get her life together. She is challenged when her estranged mother, Bonnie comes back into the picture.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Food Con Castaways/ Snail Mail

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Call the Cops/ Surf N' Turf
programme.desc: Plankton goes to jail, but the secret formula is taken as evidence so SpongeBob and Mr. Krabs plot to get it back. Sandy struggles to build a ship-in-a-bottle before a big contest, so SpongeBob calls in a little extra help.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: High Sea Diving/ Bottle Burglars

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Dino Rescue: Pups Save a Pterodactyl/ Pups and the Big Rumble
programme.desc: Maverick the daredevil Pterodactyl takes a tumble. A volcano is erupting, threatening the Dino Wilds.

programme.title: Peppa Pig: Move to Music/ School Project
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle is getting Peppa and her playgroup friends to dance to all different styles of music. It's school project time for Peppa and her friends, which means they have to build castles and bring them into playgroup.

programme.title: Blue's Clues & You: Happy Birthday Blue
programme.desc: It's Blue's birthday! We play Blue's Clues to figure out what present Blue wants for her birthday. While we look for Clues, we help Josh get ready for the party by observing patterns and taking a trip to Joe's Present Store.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Rescue a Rescuer/ Pups Save the Phantom of the Frog Po
programme.desc: Mayor Goodway tries to help the PAW Patrol rescue Danny. A spooky sound forces frogs from their home.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies: Rockin' Out
programme.desc: Goby and Gil go on a quest to get a geode at the top of a volcano. They try to make it back to the Rocky Valley Rock Show in time to enter the contest for best rock.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies: Super Baby!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines: Recycling Power
programme.desc: When Axle City is visited by a littering raccoon, it's up to Blaze to save the day as a Super Recycling Truck. He cleans up the town and rescues his friends - just in time for a final showdown with the Litter Critter.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines: Construction Crew to the Rescue
programme.desc: When Crusher and Pickle are trapped at the top of a tall, rickety tower, Blaze, Stripes, and Starla transform into awesome construction vehicles to build a way down.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Mighty Pups, Super Paws: When Super Kitties Attack
programme.desc: The Kitty Catastrophe crew gets super powers, and now those little kittens are causing big problems all over town! It'll take the Mighty Pups and their Super Paws to stop them and restore order to Adventure Bay!

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Mighty Pups, Super Paws: Pups Meet the Mighty Twins/ Save the Mega Mayor
programme.desc: Super-bandit Ladybird shrieks havoc in Adventure Bay, taking all of the town's treasures including Mayor Goodway. The Mighty Pups team up with new super pals The Mighty Twins to save the day, and the Mayor.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Mighty Pups, Charged Up: Pups Stop a Big Bad Bot / Mighty Pu
programme.desc: Harold Humdinger uses a giant robot to make his own town. The copycat is back and Adventure Bay need a mighty rescue.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Greasy Buffoons/ Model Sponge

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Chairman
programme.desc: The guys shock their fellow shoppers by going footloose and fancy free in a discount store, then pose insane questions to strangers in the park. Tonight's loser is taken for the ride of his life in a tricked out wheelchair he can't possibly control.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stuffed Turkey
programme.desc: The amount of times Joe showed his butt on the show. Why the volunteers were turned away for Tool Bag.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stage Fright
programme.desc: The guys serve up raw deals at a pawn shop counter and try to convince strangers to give them hugs. Plus, tonight's loser performs his life story through song.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Laundry Day
programme.desc: The guys look for partners in crime at a supermarket and throw caution to the wind as helpless romantics. Plus, tonight’s loser has a serious wardrobe malfunction.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Up Loser's Creek
programme.desc: Find out which joker ran for Congress as a write-in candidate, which joker was a top-notch salesman before starting the show and who had a job in finance.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Baggage Shame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr's old neighbour learns a little TMI about his personal life and which of the jokers Joe would want by his side in a fight.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Quantum Mock-Anics
programme.desc: Find out which joker gets dizzy when a cab has a strong air freshener, who can speak Spanish, and which joker struggles to keep a straight face during Joe's 'expert' punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Silence of the Lame
programme.desc: Find out who keeps the tags on his jacket so he can return them, which crew member voices the 'sexy beast' commercial, and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a black thumb, what challenges the guys like so much they play when the cameras are off, and how long it took to zombie-fry the undead in Sal's sewer punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr chose which guys to honk at Volcano Bay, what happened to the TP used in the stock boy shootout, and how Joe stayed safe after messing with NY Mets fans at Citi Field.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Find out which jokers were in on the surprise Gary Busey appearance, where the phrase 'tit for tat' came from, and how Murr's big mouth backfired on him, leading to this Statue of Liberty punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Make Womb for Daddy
programme.desc: Find out who scored free sandwiches while shooting at Blimpie; what classic game inspired the 'Guess What' challenge; and what was worse for Q than the pain he endured during his 'childbirth' punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pick a Loser
programme.desc: Find out which Joker was arrested in a foreign country and why the Jokers filmed at Madison Square Park often in the early days. Plus, learn the camera crew's motto.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Elephant in the Room
programme.desc: Find out why the Jokers wanted to film at a dentist's office, and what challenge the crew considers to be one of the greatest. Plus, find out why it's so hard to film on park benches.

programme.title: The Misery Index: This Is Not a Drill!
programme.desc: Contestants trash talk the Tenderloins, Sal's 'moist moment,' and a giant door-opening python.

programme.title: The Misery Index: The Grandma's Special
programme.desc: They may be senior citizens but these awesome ladies sure have lived! Find out what happens when a young bull charges you, and what bodily function made a girl lose 10 years of memories.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Performers 13
programme.desc: Counting down 20 of the dumbest performers you've ever seen including a woman dancing in butter and team mascots gone wild.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Performers 16

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Car Sick

programme.title: The King of Queens: Major Disturbance
programme.desc: While reading a bedtime story to Deacon's son, Doug changes the ending to make it a little scarier and ends up traumatizing the boy. Meanwhile, Arthur offers himself up as a passenger for hire so people can ride in the carpool lane.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Ruff Goin'
programme.desc: When Doug and Carrie are not invited to their block party, Doug makes an appearance to prove they are good people, but ends up having to adopt a dog from his neighbour in order to prove it. Meanwhile, Arthur offers to help Danny with his gambling problem.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Brace Yourself
programme.desc: When Deacon's son draws a picture of Arthur with crooked teeth, Arthur convinces Doug and Carrie to pay for new braces. However, when Doug attempts to use a similar strategy on Carrie, his plan backfires. Meanwhile, Spence is hired as a cook and maid.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Home Cheapo
programme.desc: When Carrie learns that Deacon and Kelly bought a second home, she convinces Doug that they were able to afford it because they are so cheap.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Offensive Fowl
programme.desc: Carrie is supportive at first of Doug's cleaner approach to life, but quickly grows tired of him trying to force his new beliefs on her and having to eat meat while in private.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Mild Bunch
programme.desc: A prank runs amok when Doug and his pal reunite at their 20th high school reunion and decide to have some fun with their old principal.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Manhattan Project
programme.desc: When an apartment becomes available in Manhattan, Carrie finally sees her dream of living in the city coming true but Doug has different plans and the two quickly realize they share a different outlook on the future.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Cowboy Country
programme.desc: When Adam passes on a family ring to convey his feelings for Dana, Beverly can't seem to accept her little boy having such deep feelings at his age. Meanwhile, new couple Lainey and Barry convince Murray to watch football with Lainey's dad.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Van People

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Deceived
programme.desc: Game wardens attempt to catch a running deer before it hurts itself. The wardens investigate an impersonation case in which a man claims to be one of their own. While patrolling Lake Tawakoni, Richards comes across a suspicious group.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: High Desert Drama
programme.desc: The Game Wardens are busy on land and water. In Hunt County, residents are concerned about alleged wolves being kept as pets. Rehabilitated turtles are released on the high seas. In West Texas, wild donkeys are under threat.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Wet and Wild
programme.desc: A hot summer weekend in Texas keeps wardens busy on the water. A festival attracts thousands of people to float the San Marcos River. Patrol on Lake Texoma leads to multiple arrests. A fisherman is questioned when he can't provide identification.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: So Many Deer, Such Little Time
programme.desc: It's the start of hunting season, dubbed the 'Holy Day for Game Wardens.' Wardens Inman and Eddins investigate the illegal shooting of two deer. Then, Wardens Stapleton and McGee swap out bass fish in the Bois d'Arc Lake.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Painted Turtle Mystery
programme.desc: Officers struggle to convince a woman to relinquish a wild squirrel, and Officer DeLisle investigates the mysterious deaths of more than twenty painted turtles. Then, Trainee Frye reveals his skills when handling his first lobster trap detail.

programme.title: North Woods Law: No Room for Error
programme.desc: Officer Lopashanski makes a surprising discovery while searching an island for an injured bald eagle. Officers Cheney and Pushee stumble upon a trespasser whose vehicle is stuck in a mud hole. Officer MacFadzen leads the search for a missing swimmer.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Boaters, Floaters and the Wildlife
programme.desc: Wardens prepare to patrol for violations on the San Marcos River, and an intoxicated man is found roaming a small island on Lake Texoma. Then, a bobcat makes a residential garage its home, while investigations begin for multiple illegal deer kills.

programme.title: North Woods Law: All Hands on Deck
programme.desc: The entire warden service pulls together for a massive search effort for a missing boy. A second search for a lost hiker stretches the wardens to their limit. A pair of salmon poachers are caught in the act and a new K-9 is trained.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Night and Day
programme.desc: The wardens work around the clock to handle turkey hunting season and smelt runs. A search warrant is needed upon the discovery of poached turkeys. The wardens come across many animals including orphaned baby foxes, nuisance beavers and a python.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: Texas Game Wardens go undercover to stop a black market for buying and selling wild animals. A trio of Wardens work the beaches of Galveston and mobilize when an oil spill threatens wildlife. A robotic deer decoy is used to catch night hunters.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Deceived
programme.desc: Game wardens attempt to catch a running deer before it hurts itself. The wardens investigate an impersonation case in which a man claims to be one of their own. While patrolling Lake Tawakoni, Richards comes across a suspicious group.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Payback Time
programme.desc: It's the start of the 2009 opilio crab season, and anything the Bering Sea held back during king crab season is now being paid out in spades. The skippers have their eyes on the oncoming ice pack, but it's a lethal, 40-foot rogue wave that's on the hunt

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: No Second Chances
programme.desc: The fleet arrives on the Opi Grounds, but they struggle to hunt down crab while facing ice, big seas, and bad information. A skipper regrets sending his men out in savage weather to save his boat, but there are no second chances on the Bering Sea.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Sea of Misery
programme.desc: It's week three of the Opilio Crab Season, and the long hours and miserable conditions already have the crabbers turning on each other and boat-crushing ice stands between one skipper and the safety of harbour.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Lockout
programme.desc: After weeks of battling freezing spray, forty-foot waves, and sub-zero temperatures, skippers begin plugging their boats with Opilio crab. But as they race to St. Paul harbour for offload, a 250,000 square mile arctic ice pack stands in their way.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: A Slap in the Face or a Kick in the Butt
programme.desc: Halfway through the season, each skipper faces a personal form of hell. Frozen crab, frozen gear and a frozen harbour chill the hearts of the most callous fishermen. On the Northwestern, Sig battles a fierce cigarette addiction and a fierce storm.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: When the fleet gets word of great fishing by the ice pack, the chase is on to the ends of the earth. However a journey to the far north push these men over the edge.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bitter Tears
programme.desc: Weeks into the Opilio's season, the fleet is bone tired and desperate for home. As delirium sets in, deadly rib-crunching mistakes are made and for one fisherman, a tragedy on land spells gut-wrenching heartbreak at sea.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Day of Reckoning
programme.desc: The Opilio season is almost over, but an arctic storm front has the skippers on edge. The boats race to plug their tanks with crabs and get back to port unscathed but on the first boat to finish, a tight-knit crew fractures.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Shipwrecked
programme.desc: It's the final 24 hours of the 2009 Opilio crab season and a savage arctic storm causes multiple vessels to send out maydays. The Coast Guard is in a race against the clock to save four men before their boat is pounded into splinters against jagged rocks.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: The Gamble
programme.desc: With crews are limited to half of last years catch, skippers must decide what type of crab to go for.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Turf War
programme.desc: With the fleet split, a tale of two fisheries emerges. On the Blue grounds, a bet has the boats jockeying for position. On the Red grounds, a returning veteran proves his worth while another boat copes with a fallen deckhand.

programme.title: Movie: Soul Plane
programme.desc: Last-minute passenger additions shake things up on an airline's maiden flight.

programme.desc: A couple with a toddler and newborn are ready to move out of his old bachelor pad condo and into a dream home that's close to family. During the house hunt, Drew is impressed by the couple's nose for real estate.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Floored by the Renovation
programme.desc: An exasperated couple is ready to give up on their home search after viewing more than 200 properties and losing out on 14 bids. To make matters worse, their condo sold more quickly than expected, so they're crashing at her parents' house.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Cool Under Pressure
programme.desc: A newlywed couple is prepared to tackle their first renovation together, and Drew leads the search for a family-friendly property. While Jonathan tries to find a compromise between Bohemian style and Vegas hotel chic, the reno is riddled with issues.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home - Unpacked: Come on Over
programme.desc: A family loves the small-town charm of their home and wouldn't dream of leaving their tight-knit community, but the house feels smaller as the kids get older. Jonathan and Drew rework their main floor so they can entertain and watch the kids become teens.

programme.title: Vacation House Rules: Ski Cottage
programme.desc: After years of neglect, a mountaintop cabin is in desperate need of renovation. Contractor Scott McGillivray and designer Debra Salmoni go all in, turning the rustic cottage into a stunning ski chalet ready to start generating vacation rental income.

programme.title: House Hunters: Putting Down Roots in Arkansas
programme.desc: A couple and their newborn daughter look to settle down and buy a home in Bentonville, Arkansas.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Fleeing From Freezing in Roatan, Honduras
programme.desc: After years of daydreaming, a family is ready to ditch the cold Massachusetts winters for a tropical Roatan, Honduras. She's looking for a private, standalone house with a pool, but he wants a beachfront condo with no maintenance.

programme.title: House Hunters: Winning in Aberdeen
programme.desc: A college basketball coach and his family are relocating to Aberdeen, South Dakota, and are pressed to find a house quickly. Tensions rise as she hopes for a fixer-upper and he wants a turnkey ready home so he can focus on coaching.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Bargaining in Bratislava
programme.desc: A young professional longing for a European experience follows her job to Bratislava, Slovakia. Taking a reduced salary, however, may force her to skimp on her new apartment to take advantage of regional travel.
