programme.title: Property Brothers: Bachelor Pad Condo to Family-Friendly Home
programme.desc: Tired of squeezing into his bachelor pad condo and ready to move to the suburbs, Erin and Adam are searching for the perfect family-friendly home.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Ready for Home Sweet Home
programme.desc: Jaeme, Bliss and their two little ones have been crashing with friends in the big city since Jaeme landed his dream job. They need their own place fast, but their wishlist is too long, and Bliss feels like they left their dream house behind.

programme.title: House Hunters: Midcentury Perfection in Palm Springs
programme.desc: A perfectionist lawyer is looking for a vacation home in Palm Springs. She wants mid-century modern with all the bells and whistles. After three years of looking her friend and her agent want her to decide before she gets priced out of this hot market.

programme.title: House Hunters: Calling the Shots in Arizona
programme.desc: A couple expecting their third child is on the hunt for a bigger home in Arizona before the baby arrives. However, she's a self-proclaimed 'helicopter mom' and isn't willing to compromise on anything, even with the baby on its way.

programme.title: House Hunters International: From Stability to Prague
programme.desc: A career-driven man discovers a new outlook on life after his father's passing but finds it hard to accept the degree of change his adventurous girlfriend has in mind. She won't settle for less than full immersion while he searches for space.

programme.title: House Hunters: Year-round Christmas in Chicago
programme.desc: First time buyers in Chicago can't agree on whether to go for a standalone home that has the vintage details she wants, or a modern townhouse that gives him the tight knit community he remembers from his childhood.

programme.title: House Hunters: Back From Abroad
programme.desc: A married couple want to move back to America after living in Europe for several years. He wants a smaller home in a walkable neighborhood but she's hoping to purchase a big, American two-story home.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Adventures in Noosa Hinterland
programme.desc: A freelance outdoor instructor wants to start an adventure business in Australia and, temped by the promise of days in the sun with their two children, his wife is onboard.

programme.title: House Hunters: New Digs in Nashville
programme.desc: Eric Malo's new job offer has him and his wife Alysha packing up in Chicago and heading back to Nashville where they're orginally from. The Malos want to find a house with more room than they have now

programme.title: House Hunters: A Place for My Daughter in Virginia
programme.desc: A buyer wants to upgrade from his small rental in Norfolk, Virginia, to a home with a room for his young daughter, and a pool table. But along on the hunt is his future roommate and best friend, who has his own priorities in mind.

programme.title: Martha Knows Best: Container Gardens
programme.desc: Martha Stewart shows how to plant a variety of container gardens, like evergreen, succulent, summer and herb gardens, with her gardener Ryan McCallister. She also calls her good friend, Snoop Dogg, who wants to know how to plants 'herbs' in containers.

programme.title: Martha Knows Best: Trees
programme.desc: Martha Stewart shows how to plant evergreen, fruit, smoke bush and Japanese maple trees and helps Jay Leno plant a pomegranate tree. She offers tree advice to Sunny Hostin, and Martha's neighbor, renowned chef Daniel Boulud, shows off his new fire pit.

programme.title: Martha Knows Best: Perennial Garden
programme.desc: Martha Stewart shows how to build a perennial flower border with the help of her gardener, Ryan McCallister. She also makes a call to her long-time friend, Richard Gere, who wants to know how to plant a perennial garden for all seasons.

programme.title: Martha Knows Best: Vegetable Garden
programme.desc: Martha Stewart shows how to plant a vegetable garden with her head gardener, Ryan McCallister, and takes a call from her friend, Antoni Porowski of Queer Eye, who needs her advice on growing vegetables on his NYC balcony.

programme.title: Martha Knows Best: Paths
programme.desc: Martha Stewart builds a stone pathway that leads to her peacocks, getting help from the foreman of her outdoor grounds crew. Actress Lupita Nyong'o calls Martha for advice on how to arrange fresh flowers and what flowers are good for beginner gardeners.

programme.title: Martha Knows Best: Pets
programme.desc: Martha Stewart shows how to make a backyard fence similar to her own dog run and dog breeder Ari Katz weighs in. Hailey Bieber gave her dog a trim and needs Martha's advice on how to fix it. Designer Zac Posen asks what vegetables he can give to his dog.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Classic Colonial Meets Modern-Day Makeover
programme.desc: Jenny and Dave are challenged to completely overhaul a historic Dutch Colonial home for a couple of farm owners and their two small children, while keeping the home's history and character.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Century-old Farmhouse Becomes New Forever Home
programme.desc: Dave and Jenny help a couple update their century-old farmhouse so that it better accommodates large family gatherings. Their main goal is to improve flow and add modern amenities without stripping the home of its unique country character.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Historic Home Overhaul
programme.desc: Dave and Jenny Marrs transform the a family's historic, 1893 house. From turning an attic space into two bedrooms to completely renovating the kitchen and living area, they pull out all the stops to give the family of five their first home.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Surprise Renovation for First-Time Homeowner
programme.desc: A new homeowner's first place needs work, so her parents recruit Dave and Jenny to pull off a surprise renovation while she's out of town. The Marrs race the clock to create a quaint, warm and welcoming home that matches the homeowner's tastes perfectly.

programme.title: Movie: Is My Daughter Really Dead?
programme.desc: A woman's husband dies in a mysterious car accident, so she decides to make a fresh start. Her daughter makes friends with some of the kids in the neighbourhood and goes on a camping trip with them, only to also end up missing.

programme.title: Movie: Kidnapped by a Classmate
programme.desc: A girl starts fresh in a new town and makes friends with a guy from school, unbeknownst to her, he has ulterior motives, which leads to her kidnapping.

programme.title: Movie: Fame at a Deadly Cost
programme.desc: A star-struck teenager suddenly goes missing and her single-mom sets off to rescue her.

programme.title: Movie: Deadly Second Chances
programme.desc: A prosecutor takes on the case of a man who is accused of killing his wife. While investigating, she determines that her own mother's death, may have been a murder.

programme.desc: Tanner's pick is one of the most terrifying locations the team has ever encountered with entities known for physically attacking, even shanking, unsuspecting visitors. Dakota's greatest fear is physically violent paranormal spirits.

programme.title: Destination Fear: Hill View Manor
programme.desc: The team returns to a location that, per to Dakota, affected them more than any other. But it's about redemption as they continue their quest to lean into the fear rather than be overcome by it.

programme.title: Destination Fear: Cambria County Jail
programme.desc: Dakota believes that Alex became violently ill on their last fright night due to total isolation and disorientation. She decides to put this theory to the test by bringing the team to the Cambria County Jail, the site of a dungeon used to torture inmates.

programme.title: Destination Fear: Sheboygan County Asylum
programme.desc: In the final episode of this cursed road trip, Dakota truly delivers on his promise of saving the 'worst' for last. In a blockbuster exclusive, the team visits an asylum that has never allowed overnight exploration until now.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Edinburgh Manor
programme.desc: The team travels to Iowa to research the 150 year old Edinburgh Manor. Here, a tall entity known as 'The Joker' haunts people who enter the property, up to and including: choking them.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Stardust Ranch
programme.desc: Ghost Adventures investigates extraterrestrial activity in Rainbow Valley, Arizona.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Grand Canyon Caverns
programme.desc: The team explores a desecrated Indian burial site at Grand Canyon Caverns.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Bell Witch Cave
programme.desc: Ghost Adventures makes history as the first paranormal TV show to investigate the Bell Witch Cave in Tennessee. The Bell Witch, one of America's oldest spirits, is the first spirit Zak has encountered that has killed a human.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Witches in Magna
programme.desc: Zak and the crew investigate a family-owned pizzeria in Magna, UT, where an evil witch has cast a spell that has the family fearing for their safety. During the lockdown, the guys try to draw out what's in the basement and get some violent responses.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: Turn, Turn, Turn
programme.desc: Camille is noticing cracks in her marriage with Kelsey gone so long. Kyle's eldest daughter is the first in the family to graduate from college, and Kyle is upset that not all the family wants to celebrate.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: Unforgivable
programme.desc: Everyone plans to party it up for Taylor's birthday, but can't escape the drama. Kim and Kyle may break their sisterly bond and Camille learns her husband want to end the marriage.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: Sex, Lies and Text Messages
programme.desc: Kyle and Dorit surprise Teddi with a baby shower, but Brandi reveals a few surprises of her own. Denise and Garcelle lament over how they think Lisa has changed, but Lisa has a very different take on things. Erika leaves LA and jets off to Broadway.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: Never Before Scene 1016
programme.desc: Follow some of the most affluent women in the country as they enjoy lavish lifestyles.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: Reunion Part 1
programme.desc: The ladies come together for a virtual sit-down to rehash the season. Kyle and Garcelle's unresolved tension finally reaches its boiling point when Kyle drops a shocking accusation. Denise is called out for refusing to have an honest conversation.

programme.title: Race in America: A Movement Not a Moment
programme.desc: Ten outspoken Bravo celebrities share their perspectives on race relations today and how we can move forward with hope. Topics include the racial inequality, the value of allies, 'Karens' and their privilege and the role of voting to change the system.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: Just the Sip
programme.desc: Leah continues to have issues with her mother and Tinsley gives updates on her dating life. Meanwhile, Sonja realizes that her fashion line isn’t doing as well as she hoped. Luann hosts an anti-bullying comedy show that turns into a battle of words.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: How You Like Them Apples?
programme.desc: Tinsley vents to Leah’s boxing coach about her issues with Dorinda, while across town Dorinda confirms to Sonja that she and John are officially on a break. Luann opens up to Leah about her relationship with drinking. The ladies take a day trip.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: If You Can't Take the Heat, Get Out of the Russian Bath House
programme.desc: Stressed out by the tension between the group, Leah arranges a spa day at a Russian bath house. Dorinda and Tinsley call a truce, while Ramona confronts Dorinda about her anger issues. Later, Ramona and Dorinda's disagreement reaches a boiling point.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: Hurricane Leah
programme.desc: The ladies head to Newport, Rhode Island for a weekend getaway. Leah invites her sister Sarah to join, which Ramona is not happy about. The drama continues between Tinsley and Dorinda, and Leah loses her cool at the evening clambake.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: Something's Brewing
programme.desc: Tinsley hosts a dinner for the group on their last night in Newport. The night begins to spiral once Ramona is distracted by a man at the bar, and the dinner goes off the rails. Donna and Luann co-host a tea party once they return to the city.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: Love Him and Leave Them
programme.desc: The ladies celebrate Halloween in the city with a scream-inducing tour of Blood Manor. Tinsley returns from Chicago with a life-changing decision and major relationship update, but soon realizes some of the ladies aren't interested.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: Eat, Drink, and Be Scary
programme.desc: Looking for love again, Ramona meets with a matchmaker. Meanwhile, Dorinda and her daughter Hannah discuss Dorinda's recent life struggles, and to mark the end of Halloween week, Luann hosts a voo-doo themed dinner party.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: Not Feelin' Jovani
programme.desc: Dorinda hosts the women at Blue Stone Manor for a weekend in the Berkshires. Sonja confronts Luann about paying her less than she deserves to perform in her cabaret show, and Dorinda steps in to defend Sonja. Elysa and Ramona discuss their friendship.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: Remember Your Blue Stone Manners
programme.desc: After a rosé fueled night, the ladies wake up to find that Luann has left Blue Stone Manor. The women head to town for some much-needed retail therapy and group healing. Later, Dorina throws an elegant dinner party and the mayhem continues.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: Sheer Madness
programme.desc: Luann and Sonja attend a meeting at the Fortune Society and spend time with women who have been incarcerated. Ramona reunites with Avery and Mario as a favourite restaurant on the Upper East Side. The ladies attend Remona's birthday bash.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: Not Very Merry-achi
programme.desc: Luann hosts a spa day for the women she met through the Fortune Society. Ramona gives Sonja a talking-to over her birthday night antics and gives Leah the cold shoulder. The women head to Cancun, Mexico, where Sonja gets liquored up too soon.

programme.title: Movie: Transformers: The Last Knight
programme.desc: With all-out war raging between humans and invading machines from another planet, an inventor teams up with a professor, an English Lord and machine named Bumblebee to find answers in the ancient past as to why the machines keep coming to Earth.

programme.title: Movie: The First Purge
programme.desc: In an attempt to reduce the crime rate, the American government makes all crimes legal for 12 hours in a small city to let people purge their more violent urges, but when the oppressed people become targets they fight back and the violence spreads.

programme.title: Movie: The Purge: Anarchy

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Kampilan
programme.desc: The scrapyard provides bladesmiths with the supplies needed to forge their signature blades, along with a coal forge. The final round sees the smiths tasked with recreating an imposing battle weapon, the Kampilan.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Tabar-Shishpar
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths have a monkey wrench thrown into the competition, literally, when they are asked to forge blades in their signature style from pipe wrenches.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Boar Spear
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths must use the steel from a suit of armour to create a signature blade. Two move to the final round where, in five days, they must create a weapon historically used for both combat and hunting: the boar spear.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Ikakalaka
programme.desc: Four smiths are forced to select a forging technique, a decision that will impact their next round. Ultimately, two smiths will be chosen to recreate the Ikakalaka African Sword.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The German Dussage
programme.desc: Four blade smiths are tasked with making a canister damascus blade from threaded bolts. After a couple of intense rounds and some brutal testing, two smiths return to their home forges to recreate the deadly German Dussage Sword.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Summer Forging Games
programme.desc: Four smiths compete in four events that test every aspect of their bladesmithing capabilities. The first two events involve creating a testable knife and Damascus throwing knives.

programme.title: Snapped: Donna Blanton
programme.desc: The death of a state trooper leads to an all-out hunt for his killer, but the evidence points to his new wife and a big secret.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Stealing Paradise
programme.desc: A group of adventurous Americans thought they had found paradise. It was a tropical hideaway, the kind of place where people didn't ask a lot of questions about their neighbors, until some of those neighbors started to disappear.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: What Happened To The Beauty Queen?
programme.desc: Nona Dirksmeyer was a young beauty queen with a boyfriend she adored. They were planning a future together. Then, Nona was brutally killed. The crime shook her hometown and exposed someone with a secret past.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Mystery in Payson Canyon
programme.desc: Kay Mortensen took pride in preparing for every possible threat, so when he was found dead at home, those who knew him were stunned. The brutal killing put two of Kay's loved ones behind bars and in danger.

programme.desc: The fire broke out before dawn. After the smoke cleared, a mother of two young children was found dead. It was the tragic end to a life that held so much promise, but for investigators, it was just the beginning.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Toxic
programme.desc: Kevin and Morgan Mengel were happy at first, but when the marriage went bad, he went missing. Police wondered if he simply left, but a family's relentless pursuit lead to a stunning confrontation and, eventually, the truth.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Murder on Nantucket Island
programme.desc: She was a savvy entrepreneur. He got his start in finance. Their connection was instant but when their summer love cooled, tempers flared and the relationship took a tragic turn. It seemed like an open and shut case but there was a surprise in store.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets in Pleasant Grove
programme.desc: The doctor and the model made a stunning couple. Together they built a loving family. Her death was sudden but ruled natural causes. Secrets remained hidden for years. Then, her daughters became amateur detectives to help unlock the mystery.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Killing in Cobb County
programme.desc: It is a story of obsession that boiled over into a brutal crime. Right away, one woman said she knew what happened. Yet, it took years to bring the alleged killer to trial and the verdict was far from the end of this case.

programme.desc: A suspicious fire hides a deadly secret and forces a son to testify against his only remaining parent.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: The House on Canyon Road
programme.desc: The gruesome discovery of a skeletonized and dismembered corpse buried in the backyard of a Seattle home results in an investigation that unravels a 30-year-old murder plot hatched by a scheming, vindictive family.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Murders in Maine
programme.desc: When a young mother in Newport Maine goes missing, the case goes cold...until another mom suddenly vanishes, sparking an investigation that leads to a deadly game of cat-and-mouse and grisly discoveries in a rustic backyard.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Struggle in the Night

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: A Deadly Plea
programme.desc: When a long held secret in Florida threatens to expose a deadly truth, investigators work to unravel a baffling mystery.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Lady in a Barrel
programme.desc: After a homeowner discovers a mummified corpse buried inside a barrel beneath his home, detectives must painstakingly piece together a series of hidden clues to locate a killer who thought they had committed the perfect murder.

programme.desc: Families all around are relying on Pol Veterinary Service to take care of their animals this summer.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: Knights of the Round Stable
programme.desc: The vets handle a stalled labor and a feisty piglet with a difficult attitude.

programme.title: Dr. Oakley: Yukon Vet: The Miracle Dog

programme.desc: A stadium on the brink of collapse, an upside-down bridge, and a massive subway project in crisis are engineering catastrophes in need of repair, and experts use cutting-edge technology to reveal if they can be fixed.

programme.title: Incredible Engineering Blunders: Fixed: Disaster in Vegas
programme.desc: A giant sinkhole, a multi-million dollar road to nowhere, and a wind turbine on the brink of disaster are engineering catastrophes in need of repair, and experts use cutting-edge technology to reveal if they can be fixed.

programme.title: Incredible Engineering Blunders: Fixed: Nightmare in Florida
programme.desc: When a brand-new bridge suddenly collapses in Miami, several die in a horrifying calamity; experts use the latest science to investigate what went wrong and how an innovative bridge-building technique could be to blame.

programme.title: Incredible Engineering Blunders: Fixed
programme.desc: Justin Cunningham and his team of intrepid reporters uncover the world’s most bizarre engineering blunders and find out how to fix them.

programme.title: Super Factories: World's Largest Steel Plant
programme.desc: The largest steel plant in the world is a hi-tech super factory that takes production to astonishing levels, turning out 21 million tons of steel every year on a sprawling campus comprised of 50 individually operating sub-factories.

programme.title: Incredible Engineering Blunders: Fixed: Nightmare in Florida
programme.desc: When a brand-new bridge suddenly collapses in Miami, several die in a horrifying calamity; experts use the latest science to investigate what went wrong and how an innovative bridge-building technique could be to blame.

programme.title: Super Factories: World's Largest Steel Plant
programme.desc: The largest steel plant in the world is a hi-tech super factory that takes production to astonishing levels, turning out 21 million tons of steel every year on a sprawling campus comprised of 50 individually operating sub-factories.

programme.title: Incredible Engineering Blunders: Fixed: Apollo 13: The Secret Evidence
programme.desc: New science reveals the inside story of the Apollo 13 disaster, and using the latest evidence, experts reveal what really went wrong and how NASA saved the lives of the three astronauts stranded in space in a life-or-death race against the clock.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Nazi Ice Fortress
programme.desc: Images of earth from space reveal an intimate portrait of human activity; Cities glow bright while the wilderness remains dark; Why the Australian outback is lit up like a series of vast cities.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mafia Ghost Ship
programme.desc: A ghost ship with links to the mob suddenly appears on a California beach. Strange markings could be a coded message that reveals a plot to overthrow the Queen of England. A lake believed to have magical healing powers holds clues to life on Mars.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mystery of Fang Forest
programme.desc: A strange forest of razor-sharp stones could be home of an undiscovered Hobbit-like humanoid species. When a man-made island mysteriously appears off the US coast, grisly new evidence points to secret government experiments into psycho-chemical warfare.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Village of the Damned
programme.desc: A forbidden island points to a strange South American town that locals claim was the home of Adolf Hitler. New data from NASA satellites might reveal a sunken lost continent in the Indian Ocean. A pit of bodies suggests fears of a zombie nightmare.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Gateway to Eden
programme.desc: A buried monument offers new evidence about one of the Bible's greatest mysteries. A giant ominous shadow engulfs the Pacific Ocean. Scientists have trouble explaining a strange lake that's shaped like a perfect circle, and is home to otherworldly life.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: CIA's Secret Revenge
programme.desc: When the Soviet Union unveils its own space shuttle, the CIA hatches a secret revenge plot. Recent discoveries shed new light on the destruction of Sodom and Gomorrah. A missing nuclear weapon could threaten a NASA base in the Arctic.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Curse of the Red Planet
programme.desc: Three cosmonauts die mysteriously as they re-enter Earth's atmosphere and NASA needs to know why. A declassified document reveals a CIA plan to use a space disaster as a cover to start World War 3. A NASA rover discovers clues that help solve a murder.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Rise of the Planet Killer
programme.desc: A mission to Mars captures an image of a strange structure on the Red Planet. Files from the first Apollo mission record an eerie sighting on the dark side of the moon. A planet-eating star gives scientists a glimpse of Earth's terrible demise.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Saturn's Death Star
programme.desc: A mysterious object is orbiting Saturn, and it looks just like the Death Star. New evidence might shed new light on the mysterious death of Yuri Gagarin, the first man in space. When a cuting-edge satellite vanishes, fears of a space war escalate.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Did We Nuke Jupiter?
programme.desc: Find out if NASA could be responsible for a nuclear explosion on Jupiter. Also, new evidence could reveal the truth behind the mystery of the iconic face on Mars. Plus, learn about an unknown force that crashed an Apollo spacecraft on the moon.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Return of the Moon Bugs
programme.desc: Apollo 12 astronauts bring back something alive from the moon and NASA tracks an asteroid heading towards Earth but makes a shocking discovery: it's not an asteroid, but an object that's artificial in nature.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: The Sun's Evil Twin
programme.desc: Two suns photographed in the sky over Indonesia could be a trick of light, or the first sighting of the Sun's evil twin; NASA scientists are baffled by ghostly white swirls on the Moon's surface.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Pluto's Evil Twin
programme.desc: After NASA's New Horizons spacecraft flies by Pluto, it encounters a strange alien world that shuts down the probe's computers, and experts investigate if this mysterious object is an alien spacecraft hiding at the edge of our solar system.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Chilled to the Bone
programme.desc: A brutal murder and frozen crime scene shatter an idyllic Idaho town. A suspect's bizarre confession has police hoping for a quick resolution, but all is not what it seems. They must find an attacker with a gruesome MO before he strikes again.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: A woman's body is found burned to death in a burning car. As the smoke settles, police arrive and find an abandoned car seat in the back seat. Investigators are frantic to find the child and fear a vicious killer lurks in Minneapolis.

programme.title: The Green River Killer: Mind of a Monster
programme.desc: Victims of The Green River Killer are still being found today. Now, with access to hundreds of hours of unseen police footage, we will reveal the shocking truth behind one of America's most prolific serial killers.

programme.title: The Green River Killer: Mind of a Monster
programme.desc: Victims of The Green River Killer are still being found today. Now, with access to hundreds of hours of unseen police footage, we will reveal the shocking truth behind one of America's most prolific serial killers.

programme.title: The Butcher Baker: Mind of a Monster
programme.desc: In the 1980s, a mild-mannered family man ran a bakery in Anchorage, Alaska. Unknown to those who knew him, he also hunted and murdered dozens of women. In a world exclusive, we see inside the warped mind of Robert Hansen with his final taped confession.

programme.title: Serial Killer on Blood Mountain
programme.desc: When beloved grandmother and avid hiker Irene Bryant is found murdered on a trail near her home in North Carolina, local park rangers are perplexed. When they realize her husband John is missing, a massive search ensues.

programme.desc: Victims of The Green River Killer are still being found today. Now, with access to hundreds of hours of unseen police footage, we will reveal the shocking truth behind one of America's most prolific serial killers.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Cynthia
programme.desc: The naked body of a vibrant young mother is found frozen solid in a deserted cemetery. When all leads dry up, the case runs cold. But years later, Kenda reopens the investigation and recognizes the sinister hallmark of a serial killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: The Monster Awakes
programme.desc: When Julie Smith reports being sexually assaulted, Lt. Joe Kenda and his Sex Crimes Unit discover a terrifying similarity to other attacks on the east side of town. It's a race against the clock to catch a serial rapist before he strikes again.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Cradle to the Grave
programme.desc: When a frantic 9-1-1 call reports an infant stopped breathing, Kenda and Walker must see if the daycare is to blame or the parents themselves. Then, Kenda works an execution-style shooting and is shocked to learn the victim is a kindly grandmother.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: My Second Case
programme.desc: A woman's mangled body is found beside a lonely stretch of highway. When the coroner suspects foul play, Kenda is called in to solve the second homicide case of his career.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Nightmare on Oak Hollow Drive
programme.desc: Etta Jean Westbrook is a long-time resident in a quiet suburb in Bryan, Texas. When she is found dead inside her home, detectives question her loved ones and canvass the neighbourhood in order to catch the killer before they strike again.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Maine Murder Mystery
programme.desc: Mike and Valerie Miller are a beloved couple in the tiny town of Webster Plantation, Maine. When they are found shot dead in their own home, authorities must probe a list of suspects that includes their own flesh and blood.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: The Lieutenant of Lampson Road
programme.desc: When a firefighter is gunned down in his driveway, everyone in his life becomes a prime suspect.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: High School Homicide
programme.desc: Kathy Chou is a typical 19-year-old, living in the Seattle suburb of Renton, Washington. When the bubbly high school senior goes missing, her friends search for her while detectives delve into her past relationships and even her own family history.

programme.title: American Monster: Stages of Grief
programme.desc: In suburban California, an intruder brutally attacks and kills Joan Dawley. As the Dawley family grieves, it's up to LAPD detectives to crack the case. Secret home movies uncover a shocking tale of deceit, and a monster lurking behind the scenes.

programme.title: American Monster: Double Cross
programme.desc: Four best friends, two married couples, multiple sordid secrets, one huge betrayal and a murder. With exclusive interviews and never-before-aired home movie footage, this is a story about how a love affair resulted in a crime of passion.

programme.title: American Monster: The Last Broadcast
programme.desc: After a taping of their local-access TV show in rural Vermont, Chrissy and Charlie Billis have a terrible accident, smashing their car into a tree. Only one survives. But tapes from the couple's TV show suggest a sinister tale behind what really happened.

programme.title: American Monster: Smoke Gets in Your Eyes
programme.desc: When a devastating fire at the Kohnle family home leaves a family member dead, it appears to be a tragic accident. As the evidence mounts up, it's the testimony of two young kids who lead the police to decipher if it was an accident, suicide or murder.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Island Warfare
programme.desc: By the summer of 1942, the US has the upper hand in the war with Japan. It has achieved naval superiority. In the spring of 1945 the loss of life is great for both sides but Japan refuses to surrender. US Chiefs desperately look for a way to end the way.

programme.title: Life Aid
programme.desc: Over twenty military veterans and first responders die by suicide every day in America. First responders and military veterans are discovering new therapies that treat the health of the brain, reduce mental health symptoms and restore hope.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Heroes of Tarawa
programme.desc: Everything went wrong in America's first test of whether the Japanese-held islands of the Pacific, the key steppingstones to the doorstep of Japan, could be captured by across-the-beach infantry assaults.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: No Surrender
programme.desc: The war is turning America's way. Yet Japan is determined to kill as many Americans as possible and fight to the death. The US must determine if it has the stomach for the fight, or if there is a secret weapon that offers a quick way out.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Battle for Sugar Loaf
programme.desc: Taking an otherwise nondescript hill on the embattled island of Okinawa proved to be one of the most incredible battles of WWII. The young weary marines of Charlie Company strained against the searing Pacific sun to see the top of Sugar Loaf Hill.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Island War
programme.desc: By the spring of 1943, the Pacific war had reached a turning point. The United States had stopped the Japanese advance, now it launched a two-pronged attack to drive it back. To achieve this, the U.S. Navy had to pioneer new forms of warfare.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Victory in the Pacific
programme.desc: By the beginning of 1945, Japan's situation was desperate. Its navy and naval air power had effectively ceased to exist, while U.S. carriers and amphibious forces roamed at will across the Pacific Ocean, attacking Japanese-occupied islands.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Battle for Sugar Loaf

programme.desc: By the spring of 1943, the Pacific war had reached a turning point. The United States had stopped the Japanese advance, now it launched a two-pronged attack to drive it back. To achieve this, the U.S. Navy had to pioneer new forms of warfare.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Victory in the Pacific

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: No Surrender
programme.desc: The war is turning America's way. Yet Japan is determined to kill as many Americans as possible and fight to the death. The US must determine if it has the stomach for the fight, or if there is a secret weapon that offers a quick way out.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Heroes of Tarawa
programme.desc: Everything went wrong in America's first test of whether the Japanese-held islands of the Pacific, the key steppingstones to the doorstep of Japan, could be captured by across-the-beach infantry assaults.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Those Damned Engineers
programme.desc: In December of 1944, the seemingly defeated Germans secretly mustered 600,000 battle-hardened troops, including whole SS Panzer Divisions, into an all out offensive to capture Antwerp, the heart of the Allied supply chain.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Magnificent Bastards of Dai Do
programme.desc: The noble warriors of Echo Company, 2nd Battalion, 4th Marines face down an overwhelming North Vietnamese Army in Dai Do and rescue their fellow Marines. Tattered, torn and depleted the men of Echo Company repeatedly deny the enemy its victory.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Death Ridges of Peleliu
programme.desc: The First Marine Division forged a ferocious struggle with the Japanese at Peleliu. It would take 74 days and cost 10,000 American lives but the blood and courage of this small band of heroes would ultimately break the back of the enemy.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Untold Story of the Battle of Mortain
programme.desc: Hitler said, 'The coming battle would be the most decisive of the war.' Little did he know, that battle would be determined by a small group of National Guardsmen on top a hill, fighting to deny what Hitler wanted most: victory.

programme.title: Epic Feuds: The Johnson County War
programme.desc: In 1880s Wyoming, a feud explodes when ranching homesteaders like Nate Champion face off against cattle barons like Frank Wolcott, over land, power and the future of the American West.

programme.title: Epic Feuds: The Royal Gorge War
programme.desc: When Leadville, Colorado strikes silver in the 1870s, the race is on between the Atchison, Topeka and Santa Fe Railway, and the Denver and Rio Grande Railroad, to be the first to lay tracks through the narrow Royal Gorge.

programme.title: Epic Feuds: The Pleasant Valley War
programme.desc: In the dangerous frontier of Arizona, two ranching families begin as friends – but become locked in an epic battle known as the Pleasant Valley War. It's the deadliest 'family' feud in U.S. history.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Bonnie and Clyde
programme.desc: Bonnie Parker and Clyde Barrow are among the most famous outlaws in history. Murderers and hold-up artists, the pair robbed numerous banks, gas stations and stores in rural areas and killed at least nine people during their spree.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Machine Gun Kelly
programme.desc: George Francis Barnes J, better known as 'Machine Gun Kelly,' was an Irish American gangster during the Prohibition era. His nickname came from his favourite weapon, a Thompson submachine gun.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: John Dillinger
programme.desc: John Dillinger was the most brazen of the infamous criminals of the Great Depression, and probably the most brutal, credited with a string of bank robberies and at least a dozen murders across Indiana in 1933.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Pretty Boy Floyd
programme.desc: Notorious criminal 'Pretty Boy' Floyd was involved in over 30 bank robberies and perhaps as many as 20 murders.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Melvin Purvis: The Gangbuster

programme.title: Refresh Your Home
programme.desc: Decor and living essentials.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Heart of the Home
programme.desc: Tamara Day tackles the battered kitchen of her new property, an 1897 bungalow. She enlarges and modernizes the space while preserving traditional elements of a bungalow kitchen.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: How Suite It Is
programme.desc: Tamara Day transforms a bedroom as she continues renovating an 1897 bungalow. Knowing modern buyers expect a master suite, Tamara annexes a second room to enlarge the tiny closet and add a bathroom.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Double Dutch Dilemma
programme.desc: Tamara gets the opportunity to renovate a French chateau she's wanted to tackle for years. She finds that a recent renovation left the kitchen looking outdated and tacky, but she's determined to create a home full of authentic details.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Trouble With Cobbles
programme.desc: Tamara continues work on a French chateau as she overhauls a large master suite covered in the tackiest wallpaper she's ever ripped out. She plans to move a bathroom to create an additional bedroom and extend a hallway.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Catwalk Craziness
programme.desc: Tamara Day starts on a 1900 Kansas City Shirtwaist-style home containing a living room with a catwalk instead of a ceiling. She pulls up linoleum flooring and gives the damaged foyer staircase a facelift.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: When One Barn Door Closes
programme.desc: After restoring a fourth bedroom in the Shirtwaist home, Tamara creates a reading nook and closet to complete the room. Then the Kansas City weather creates a problem in the front yard, while two vanities might not fit in the master bath.

programme.title: Restored: 1915 Arts And Crafts
programme.desc: Brett Waterman gets the chance to restore an enormous Arts and Crafts home with six bedrooms for a family that grew from four children to eight children in just two years.

programme.title: Restored: Farmhouse Style
programme.desc: Brett explores the popular Farmhouse style by revisiting two of his favorite restorations.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: The Beam Cabin: The Whole Story

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: The Johnny Jett Special
programme.desc: Machinist, artist and craftsman Johnny Jett is honoured by The Barnwood Builders in this one-hour special. Johnny's most unforgettable moments are highlighted as well as previously unaired footage featuring West Virginia's favorite Renaissance man.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Plagued by Perfectionism
programme.desc: A woman wants to support her husband's dream of flipping a house in Parma, OH, but she quickly realizes his perfectionism will result in a slower flip than anticipated. As each project becomes more complicated, she feels stuck in a never-ending flip.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Rare and Recycled
programme.desc: A determined couple has found a 1960s gem of a beach home with a rare design element: a unique breezeway running through its center. The couple is serious about preserving its classic look and expanding upon the unique breezeway.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Big Beach Dreams
programme.desc: Marnie's friend Leslie has achieved her dream of buying a beautiful house on the beach, but it needs a lot of work. Now she needs Marnie's help to turn it into the beach home and entertaining hub she's always dreamed about.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Big Family, Bigger Beach Home
programme.desc: A couple's Dewey Beach home has become cramped and in need of reconfiguration. With a new open-concept layout, Marnie aims to preserve the integrity of the house while improving the flow and maximizing space.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Blown-out Beach House
programme.desc: A family with many fond memories of summer vacations in their Lewes, Delaware, beach house finds that their cottage's awkward layout isn't working. The space is maximized by vaulting the ceiling as well as adding an open-concept ground floor.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Amazing A-Frame
programme.desc: A couple turns to Marnie to help them transform their shabby A-frame retreat into a beautiful family beach home.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Seaside Spectacular
programme.desc: A family living in their dream location of Bethany Beach, DE, calls on Marnie to save their cramped 1980s beach house. Marnie's mission is to drag it into the present with a nautical makeover and make it look as beautiful as the beaches around it.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Captain's Paradise
programme.desc: A former ship captain and his wife decide to buy a classic beach cottage a block away from the water. The location is perfect but the interior of the home has structural and layout flaws.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: No Longer Grandma's House
programme.desc: After inheriting his family's Cape Cod cottage in Bethany Beach, Delaware, a man realizes it looks like grandma still lives in the home. Marnie plans to bring the house up to date by ripping out the old wood paneling and more.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Open-Concept Canal Home
programme.desc: Karen's 30-year-old canal-side home has an enormous backyard and attractive deck area, but its choppy 1980s layout and awkward additions aren't functional for entertaining. Marnie has big plans for it including an indoor and outdoor kitchen renovation.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Bethany Beach Bunks
programme.desc: A family with a new baby is bursting out of their cramped bungalow in Bethany Beach, Delaware. Marnie creates more space for the family by opening up the kitchen, relocating a laundry room and building magical bunk beds to accommodate the children.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Mountain Paradise
programme.desc: The Kings take on their most spectacular project to date when a young family asks them to build the perfect pool for their dream home overlooking the mountains outside Ogden, Utah. They want the works including a 50 ft. long, 12 ft. deep pool.

programme.title: Pool Kings: The Stakes Are High
programme.desc: A young family recently relocated to College Grove, TN and they desperately miss having a pool to enjoy. With a major elevation issue in their new backyard, Kyle and his team have a challenging build to tackle.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Hole in the Plan
programme.desc: An active Florida family recently traded in the tropical life for the cool countryside in Auburntown, Tennessee.

programme.title: Pool Kings: From Eyesore to Ultimate Pool Party Paradise
programme.desc: A family that loves to entertain relocates from Chicago to Nashville. They are in desperate need of a pool for the hot summer days. However, their backyard is not functional for the kids, so Kelly, Christian and Cameron work to transform the space.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Tuscan Wonderwall
programme.desc: The Pool Kings are faced with a dilapidated 1980s-style pool and a family that wants a beautiful yard where they can cook outside. They rip out the old pool and build a Tuscan beauty with multiple overflows and glass detail work.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Dream Pool
programme.desc: Vic and Yukari had to leave their beloved pool behind when they moved into a California community. Brian and Paul must create an epic pool in the couple's new, small space, and the design includes an exposed acrylic wall holding back water.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Champagne Spa Wishes and Forever-home Dreams
programme.desc: Grandparents Joe and Beth want to add a dream pool to their forever home so they can host more family events. They hope the addition of this backyard oasis will complete their dream home and allow them to create many more memories outside.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Eyesore to Elegance
programme.desc: After renovating a fixer-upper into their dream home, a couple is ready to add the final touch by restoring the old pool. Paul and Brian Porter create a modern oasis by adding an infinity edge spa, fire bowls and a luxury barbecue area.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Something for Everyone
programme.desc: A family in San Antonio, Texas, is remodeling their home and they want a custom pool that has something for everyone. Paul and Tony design a 13-foot-high, split-level pool with a baja shelf for Mom and plenty of entertainment space for Dad.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Game Time
programme.desc: After dealing with hot summers and limited options for swimming, a Tennessee father has decided it's time to get a pool of his own. The Pool Kings are up for the task and create a sports pool that will provide endless entertainment.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Phenomenal Philly Food Feast
programme.desc: Nick Lachey hooks up with Michael Symon in Philadelphia, one of the best beer cities in the country with a food scene to match. From Chef Jose Garces' over-the-top bourbon burger, to true German smoked sausages.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Salty and Smoky in the Windy City
programme.desc: Anthony Anderson hooks up with Michael Symon to discover some of the city's legendary food institutions for sensational smoke sausages and indulgent burgers.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Motor City's Mouthwatering Meats
programme.desc: Michael Symon takes reality television star Kendra Wilkinson on a whirlwind food and beer tour of Detroit to introduce her to one of the country's most resurgent cities.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Comedy and Cooking in the City of Angels
programme.desc: Michael Symon and hilarious TV star Billy Gardell embark on an uproarious adventure in Los Angeles filled with laughter, hijinks and visiting a perfect balance of legendary food joints and new spots on the scene.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Swine Dining
programme.desc: Roger Mooking heads to the Liberty Kitchen in Houston, Texas, where Chef Lance Fegen has built a monster wood-fired Argentinian grill. Roger and Lance prepare a traditional Balinese pig roast by spit-roasting it over bold mesquite coals.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Generations Of Smoke
programme.desc: Barbecue is in the blood at two family-run institutions where the dedication for perfecting smoked meats spans decades.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Red-Hot Roasts
programme.desc: Roger visits two caterers in the South who specialize in live-fire cookouts. He starts in Chattanooga, Tennessee where Argentinian grill master Mariano Cebrián has an incredible collection of portable rigs to create fantastical live-fire events.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Out Of This World Bbq
programme.desc: Roger meets a pit master with a PhD who cooks Carolina-style whole hog barbecue in Louisiana. Dr. Howard Conyers is an engineer for NASA by day, but a pit master at night.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Meals Over Miami
programme.desc: Get ready to dance with the diverse flavors that color in mouthwatering Miami. There's a papita-topped Cuban street food favorite, a pepper-packed burger that brings the heat, bold burritos, decadent mac 'n' cheese and more.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Tasty Taverns
programme.desc: Grab a seat at the bar and enjoy a pint at these tasty taverns! A French-trained chef is slinging quality Mexican fare in NOLA and a tavern in Chicago is serving up big beer and bold burgers.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Bodacious Bowls
programme.desc: Diners take a break from the plate as they dig into super-stacked bowls across the country, from mac 'n' cheese flights of fancy and comforting pasta creations to bold beef stews and a chili with soul.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Michigan to Maize

programme.title: Amphibia: Grubhog Day/ Hop Pop and Lock

programme.title: Big City Greens: Fill Bill/ Critterball Crisis
programme.desc: When the Greens dine at a seafood restaurant, Cricket and Tilly decide to rescue a live octopus.

programme.title: DuckTales: Raiders of the Doomsday Vault!

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The Fate of the Roommates
